title: 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists families impacted by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Assistance may include financial assistance, information, and support getting connected to other resources. All referrals will be reviewed in accordance with the emergency fund guidelines and eligibility criteria. Due to the high volume of requests received, assistance cannot be guaranteed. Eligibility: Family members from the same household who have been or are currently detained by ICE Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email 211 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Tag @IIS team in Slack and transfer to ICE Impact Support skill FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Immigration Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
